title: Squall (disambiguation)
content:
'''Squall''' may refer to:
__NOTOC__
==[[Canon]]==
===Creatures===
*[[Squall (rodent)|'''Squall''']], a [[rodent]]

===Events===
*'''[[Squall Season]]''', a windy [[season]] on the [[moon]] [[Toshara]]

===Locations===
*'''[[The Squall]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] sparring arena

===Organizations and titles===
*'''[[Squall Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[starfighter]] [[squadron]]

===Vehicles and vessels===
*'''''[[Squall]]''''', a [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]]
*'''''[[Squall Spider]]''''', a [[Nihil]] [[Spider Cruiser]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Characters===
*'''[[Squalls]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]

===Creatures===
*[[Squall (species)|'''Squall''']], a [[lagomorph]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]

===Locations===
*'''[[The Squall/Legends|The Squall]]''', an arena at the [[Imperial Royal Guard Academy]] on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]

===Organizations and titles===

===Vehicles and vessels===

*[[Squall (shuttle)|'''''Squall''''']], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]
